• Notes🩷: HAPPY SEPTEMBERRR WVEN THO IM A BIT LATEEEE also I’ve been thinking about Jared Leto’s joker sm recently… I mean I do atleast once every two weeks but oml he’s fine😿

‼️if you don’t like this or feel uncomfortable, just ignore it. I can’t cater to everyone’s preferences so just wait until my next upload and hopefully you’ll enjoy that.

‼️Please don’t harass me and leave comments about how disgusting and weird I am for making idol bots or degrading me because you don’t agree with the bots I post. I don’t actually perceive these idols the way I do in bots. I just enjoy writing so instead block me or just scroll.
